title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 644.121 - Rules and procedures, commission to adopt
text:
644.121.  Rules and procedures, commission to adopt. — The commission may adopt such rules, regulations and procedures to be followed in applying for state assistance herein authorized as shall be necessary for the effective administration thereof and as necessary to meet federal requirements.
(L. 1972 S.B. 424, A.L. 1973 S.B. 259, S.B. 321, A.L. 1987 H.B. 497, A.L. 1991 S.B. 185) 
Effective 6-18-91
